description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6 Docker image, runs npm config set loglevel warn and npm install --quiet in a before_script, and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a single test stage with two jobs: lint and test. The lint job runs in the test stage and executes ./node_modules/.bin/tslint -- \"src/**/*.ts\". The test job runs in the test stage and runs npm test. No special rules or deployment targets are required.
